name: Frittata Di Spaghetti (Spaghetti Frittata)
recipeIngredient: 4 slice Prosciutto or ham, diced - about 1/4 lb
1 1/2 cups Mozzarella or other cheese, cubed (about 6 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, sauté the prosciutto or ham in olive oil until crispy.
Drain on paper towels.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs. Add Parmigiano-Reggiano, salt, pepper,
and basil or parsley. Mix in the spaghetti and mozzarella cheese.
3. Heat 2 tbsp butter and 2 tbsp olive oil in a 9-inch frying pan.
Add the spaghetti mixture and smooth with a spatula.
4. Cook over medium-low heat until browned on the bottom and set.
5. Invert a plate larger than the frying pan over the pan to turn out
the frittata.
6. Heat remaining butter and olive oil in the pan. Return the frittata
to the pan to brown the other side, stirring occasionally.
7. Invert a serving plate over the frying pan to carefully turn out
the frittata.
8. Serve at room temperature, cut into wedges.
